title: Background Checker
description: Runs a public-source due diligence sweep on a subject (handle, name, phone). Gathers signals from X + public Facebook Groups, runs each through verifier_listing's red-flag screener, cross-checks the subject for fraud patterns, and synthesises everything into a single report.
example_missions: Background-check @some_handle on X for romance-scam patterns
Verify a Lagos-based seller's credibility before paying a deposit

subject.description: Handle, name, phone, or other identifier to check

depth.description: Quick: ~30s, X only. Standard: X + 1 FB Group. Deep: X + multiple FB Groups + cross-references.

x_query_override.description: Optional X search query. If empty, derived from subject.

fb_group_ids.description: Facebook Group IDs to scan for mentions of the subject.
